global.description: The ad features a promotional offer for CrispBox with a clear discount message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on CrispBox products.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A prominent logo featuring the word 'CrispBox' in bold, modern typography against a light background.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching text that reads 'Up to 40% off' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Weekend offer text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline stating 'Only this weekend' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A visually distinct badge indicating a discount, featuring a percentage symbol and vibrant colors.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A clear price tag displaying '$4.99' in a bold font, emphasizing the affordability of the offer.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Claim reward' designed to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Subtle geometric shapes in the background that add depth without distracting from the main message.
